violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. White shelf needs ends painted.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Serving boats need to be inverted during storage.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The edges of the white shelves in the kitchen are bare wood. This is not a cleanable surface. Need to be painted, or sealed.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Pizza boxes on the shelf above the pizza cutting station and on top of the pizza warmer were not inverted. Paper boats by the ice cream machine were not inverted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor in the walk in cooler has debris under the storage shelves. Needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The floor in the walk in cooler is rusty and no longer a cleanable surface.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
